pages.content:
✅ Our Commitments.

  • Deliver authentic and affordable digital goods.
  • Ensure full compliance with platform-specific rules and regional policies.
  • Maintain transparency in pricing and service.
  • Build long-term trust with our customers through reliability and consistency.

❌ What we never do.

To protect our customers and maintain our credibility, Game Shop Nepal strictly avoids:

  • Fraudulent, deceptive, or misleading activity.
  • Circumventing geo-restrictions through exploits, VPN abuse, or other manipulative methods.
  • Unauthorized resale or redistribution of accounts, services, or digital goods.
  • Promotion of NSFW content, hate speech, or ToS-violating communities.

👥 Customer Responsibilities.

To ensure smooth service and compliance, we kindly expect our customers to:

  • Use all purchased digital goods within the Terms of Service of the respective platforms.
  • Always read the product description carefully before making a purchase to understand exactly what is being offered.
  • Avoid sharing or reselling accounts/licenses provided by Game Shop Nepal.
  • Refrain from using VPNs, exploits, or other methods that may result in account bans or ToS violations.
  • Contact us directly for support or issue resolution instead of engaging in unsafe third-party fixes.

🔐 Our Promise

We are committed to building a safe, fair, and trustworthy marketplace for all gamers and digital service users in Nepal. Every product we provide is backed by our dedication to honesty, customer satisfaction, and compliance with industry standards.
pages.title: About Us

pages.content:
Effective Date: February 7th 2023
Last Updated: November 13th 2025

Welcome to Game Shop Nepal (“we,” “our,” or “us”). By accessing or purchasing from our website gameshopnepal.com, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before using our services.

1. Definitions
